recommendations: bash_retry_without_diagnosis escalated to WORSENING: iteration count regressed from 8+ to 13+ in same unit type across consecutive cycles. The widening pivot threshold is the signal — recommend monitoring whether next cycle exceeds 13+ before AskUserQuestion; if so, classify as STRUCTURAL_FIXTURE with a hard iteration cap as the required fix rather than bias remediation.

catalogue_discovery_shell_sub_variant has fired 8 consecutive cycles with zero variation in trigger, path sequence, or resolution — this is a structural fixture. Deprioritize from active recommendations; flag only if the resolution path changes or a fourth path attempt appears.

hook_false_positive_content_match is similarly entrenched (6 cycles, identical trigger and identical python3 workaround recovery). No further remediation recommendations warranted unless recovery path degrades or the blocked command shape changes.

mcp_retry_without_diagnosis has held at x3 retries for 5 consecutive cycles with no improvement. If the pattern persists unchanged in the next two cycles, reclassify as structural fixture and stop recommending fixes — the agent has no diagnostic path available when MCP calls return partial data without error signals.

optimistic_edit_without_read shows a context-sensitivity pattern: failures cluster on complex multi-edit sequences against frequently-modified files; unit-40 zero-failure edits on isolated targets suggest the bias is narrower than the label implies. Recommend narrowing the label to 'optimistic_edit_on_hot_files' in the next cycle assessment if the pattern holds.
